title: ToolTreaux Nylon Storage Tool Bag with Side Pockets and Shoulder Strap 15 x 9 In
description:
Keep all of your tools and materials in one convenient place with the ToolTreaux Nylon Storage Tool Bag! Our tool bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them. The bag itself measures 15" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories. The bag has 2 top carry handles, and also comes with a separate adjustable shoulder strap that you can attach to the bag for additional carrying options. The bottom of the bag is built-in, so you don't have to worry about it losing its shape over time

ToolTreaux Nylon Storage Tool Bag with Side Pockets and Shoulder Strap 15 x 9 In

Keep all of your tools and materials in one convenient place with the ToolTreaux Nylon Storage Tool Bag!

Key Features

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - The ToolTreaux tool bag is constructed of high-quality, durable nylon that will protect your tools and accessories when not in use.
  • LARGE CAPACITY - The bag measures 15" x 9" x 10" so you can pack all of your necessary tools like a hammer, wrench, pliers, measuring tape, nails, bits and more.
  • 2 CARRY OPTIONS - The bag comes with 2 top carry handles and an additional 50" adjustable shoulder strap so you can carry it however is most comfortable for you.
  • WORKSHOP ESSENTIAL - Tool bags are a must-have storage solution for crafters, hobbyists and hardware enthusiasts alike! You can easily store it in the back of your vehicle so you'll always have access to your tools when you need them.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 15" x 9" x 10", Color: Black/OD Green, Material: Nylon, Adjustable Strap Length: 50", Sturdy Zip Closure

Product Specifications

  • MPN: NYTTBBLK15
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 15 in x 9 in

Our tool bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them. The bag itself measures 15" x 9" x 10" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories.

The bag has 2 top carry handles, and also comes with a separate adjustable shoulder strap that you can attach to the bag for additional carrying options. The bottom of the bag is built-in, so you don't have to worry about it losing its shape over time.

This ToolTreaux tool bag is a must-have essential for crafters, hobbyists, and hardware enthusiasts! Once you pack it up, you can easily throw it in the back of your vehicle so you'll never be too far away from your tools.
